prompt: An airy new tab wallpaper inspired by Claude Monet's Impressionist garden paintings: expansive warm white canvas, a soft lily pond and pale water reflections drifting along the lower edge, loose brushstrokes, delicate pastel color, poetic and calm.
style: French Impressionism inspired by Monet, soft broken brushwork, luminous atmosphere, adapted as a minimal UI background with generous white space.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 75-85% open warm white space. Place the pond, lilies, and soft reflections low across the bottom edge, leaving the center and upper area clean for Lumno newtab UI.
lighting: Soft morning light, misty luminous air, gentle and quiet.
palette: warm white, pale lavender, soft sage, light blue, blush pink, muted yellow
materials: visible oil-paint brushstrokes, fine canvas texture, soft pigment edges
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Must feel like a refined UI wallpaper, not a dense full painting. Keep center readable and uncluttered.
negative: busy full-frame scene, dark background, hard outlines, high contrast, readable typography, photorealism, glossy 3D

prompt: A minimal Impressionist new tab wallpaper inspired by Monet's haystack and field studies: mostly ivory-white space, a few soft haystack-like rounded forms and pale meadow strokes near the lower-left edge, hazy sunlight, elegant and serene.
style: Monet-inspired Impressionism, loose pastel brushwork, quiet rural motif, designed as a bright UI background.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Preserve 80% clean ivory space. Put the meadow and haystack forms low and left, with open center and upper-right area for UI content.
lighting: Hazy late-afternoon light, soft glow, low contrast.
palette: ivory white, straw beige, pale peach, sage green, powder blue, light ochre
materials: oil paint texture, soft canvas grain, broken impressionist strokes
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Keep the image airy, calm, and background-friendly.
negative: crowded landscape, strong black outlines, saturated sunset, people, buildings, readable typography

prompt: A bright Impressionist coastal new tab wallpaper inspired by Monet's seaside and cliff paintings: vast white sky, pale blue water and soft cliff-like shapes along the bottom-right edge, loose shimmering brushstrokes, calm and artful.
style: Monet-inspired coastal Impressionism with luminous white sky, soft broken color, and minimal decorative density for UI use.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep the center and top mostly white. Place gentle coastline, water shimmer, and pale cliff forms on the lower-right edge only.
lighting: Bright diffused coastal daylight, soft haze, tranquil mood.
palette: white, pale sky blue, seafoam, light sand, lavender gray, soft coral accents
materials: canvas texture, wet-on-wet oil brushwork, subtle pigment granulation
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Make it suitable behind Lumno newtab UI with plenty of empty space.
negative: stormy sky, dark ocean, dense waves, sharp realism, boats with text, readable typography

prompt: An airy new tab wallpaper inspired by Georges Seurat and pointillism: mostly white paper space, a sparse riverside park scene made of delicate colored dots along the bottom edge, tiny tree silhouettes and soft water reflection, elegant and quiet.
style: Pointillist art inspired by Seurat, delicate stippled color dots, structured but minimal, adapted as a UI wallpaper with lots of white space.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 75-85% white negative space. Put the dotted riverside park low along the bottom, with a very clean center and upper field for UI.
lighting: Soft afternoon light, gentle atmospheric shimmer.
palette: white, pale green, soft blue, muted rose, straw yellow, tiny dark navy accents
materials: fine pointillist dots, matte paper texture, subtle printed grain
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Dots should feel refined and light, not noisy or dense.
negative: dense all-over point pattern, dark background, large figures, high contrast, readable typography, photorealism

prompt: A minimal pointillist new tab wallpaper inspired by Seurat's park compositions: expansive warm white background, small clusters of dotted trees, parasol-like shapes, and soft grass strokes near the lower-left corner, refined and playful but quiet.
style: Seurat-inspired pointillism with airy composition, tiny color dots, understated park motif, suitable as a bright UI background.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep 80% open white space. Place dotted park forms only at the lower-left and lower margin, leaving the center empty.
lighting: Clear soft daylight, calm leisure atmosphere, low contrast.
palette: warm white, mint green, powder blue, pale yellow, rose, muted violet, small charcoal accents
materials: pointillist stippling, paper grain, subtle printed texture
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Keep it minimal and background-friendly, with no dominant subject in the center.
negative: busy crowd scene, dark trees filling the frame, saturated primary colors, readable typography, hard vector shapes

prompt: A serene pointillist seashore new tab wallpaper inspired by Seurat's coastal works: a vast white sky, pale dotted sea and sandy shoreline along the bottom-right, tiny sail-like abstract shapes, very sparse and elegant.
style: Seurat-inspired pointillist coastal minimalism, fine colored dots, bright white negative space, calm UI wallpaper mood.
composition: Wide 16:9 wallpaper. Keep the top and center almost entirely white. Place the dotted sea and shore low and to the right, with a few tiny abstract sails far from the UI center.
lighting: Bright hazy seaside light, soft and spacious.
palette: white, pale cyan, sand beige, muted coral, light ultramarine, soft green-gray
materials: fine stippled pigment dots, matte paper texture, subtle grain
constraints: No text, no logo, no watermark. Keep the image airy, artistic, and unobtrusive behind newtab UI.
negative: dense dotted field, dark navy background, large boats, people, strong outlines, readable typography
